data.content: Shipment complete. Fast-forwarded main from 9f4dc40701685f7426ddc82e06483dfa12c54e00 to 28cedb557f444696776b2b7ea78826f0179fc0ca and pushed HEAD:main to origin/main. Local merge printed the known sync warning about 1 active lease during post-merge sync, but git merge and push both succeeded. Remote checks for commit 28cedb557f444696776b2b7ea78826f0179fc0ca are green: CI 25309019513 success and Coverage Badge 25309019496 success; CI emitted non-failing coverage regression annotations.
